text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I managed to run the entire race, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now there is no doubt that I've returned to full
health. All that remains is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To show everyone that I can run the Japan Cup
perfectly.
choice_data_list: Let's start getting ready for it!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: This is the last of the Classic Triple Crown races...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've seen firsthand how determined other racers
are and learned about my personal shortcomings.
These past six months have taught me a lot.
choice_data_list: That will all help you as you move forward.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. That is the only thing we can do—move
forward.
